headline: MetLife Recommends Shareholders Reject "Mini-Tender" Offer by Potemkin Limited
summary: NEW YORK, April 14, 2026--MetLife, Inc. (NYSE: MET) today announced that it has received notice of an unsolicited mini-tender offer by Potemkin Limited ("Potemkin") to purchase up to 100,000 shares of MetLife, Inc. common stock from MetLife shareholders. The offer is for approximately 0.02 percent of MetLife shares of common stock outstanding as of March 31, 2026. Potemkin’s offer price of $44.20 per share is approximately 41.35 percent lower than the $75.36 closing price of MetLife common stock

headline: AIG Stock Drops 9% YTD: Should Investors Buy Before the Bounce?
summary: American International is down 9% YTD, but improving underwriting mix, cost discipline and strong capital deployment may set the stage for a rebound.
